selection_policy.mandatory: human-reviewed bounces, auto-bounce candidates, and weak rally endpoints

notes: Monocular sightings are fit as camera rays through event-anchored physics arcs.
Output is for world rendering and diagnostics only.
Do not use this artifact for BALL detector metrics, gates, training, or promotion.
Diagnostic ball_physics3d reference was not run because one or more production arc segments exceeded their wall-clock budget.
